title: histiopteris alte-alpina
intro: Histiopteris alte-alpina, also known as the tree fern or ponga, is a type of fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Histiopteris alte-alpina include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the healing of wounds. Histiopteris alte-alpina can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, salves, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
